name: tabs
title: Tabs
description: Terminal-styled tabbed interface with horizontal and vertical orientation support.

docs.description: Terminal-styled tabbed interface with horizontal and vertical orientation support.

anatomy.name: TabsContent
anatomy.note: Panel shown when tab is active

notes.title: Orientation Support
notes.content: Tabs default to horizontal orientation. Set orientation='vertical' to stack triggers vertically. Keyboard arrow directions automatically align with the orientation.

keyboard.description: TabsList has built-in keyboard navigation via @diffgazer/keys. ArrowLeft/ArrowRight (horizontal) or ArrowUp/ArrowDown (vertical) navigate between tabs. Home/End jump to first/last tab. Enter/Space activate the focused tab.
